SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver

Class TCPVirtualServer

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.TCPVirtualServer
All Implemented Interfaces:
VirtualServer, EventListener
public class TCPVirtualServer extends Object implements VirtualServer
This class is the implementation of the VirtualServer interface for the TCP connection.

    Description

    This method sends a message to the server to draw a card from the available cards.

    This method sends a message to the server to draw a card from the deck.

    • TCPVirtualServer

      public TCPVirtualServer()

  • Method Details

    • getOut

      public ObjectOutputStream getOut()
      getter for the ObjectOutputStream.
      Returns:
      the ObjectOutputStream.

    • setOut

      public void setOut(ObjectOutputStream out)
      setter for the ObjectOutputStream.
      Parameters:
      out - the ObjectOutputStream.

    • createLobby

      public void createLobby(String nick, int numPlayers)
      This method sends a message to the server to create a lobby.
      Specified by:
      createLobby in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      nick - the nickname of the player.
      numPlayers - the number of players in the lobby.

    • askLobbies

      public void askLobbies()
      This method sends a message to the server to ask for the available lobbies. The server will respond with a LobbyListMessage. The client will then be able to join one of the lobbies.
      Specified by:
      askLobbies in interface VirtualServer

    • joinLobby

      public void joinLobby(int hash, String nick)
      This method sends a message to the server to join a lobby. The server will respond with a LobbyMessage. The client will then be able to start the game.
      Specified by:
      joinLobby in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      hash - the hash of the lobbies.
      nick - the nickname of the player.

    • placeStartCard

      public void placeStartCard(String player, int cardId, String side, Position pos)
      This method sends a message to the server to place the start card. The server will respond with a PlaceMessage. The client will then be able to place the workers.
      Specified by:
      placeStartCard in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      player - the nickname of the player.
      cardId - the id of the card.
      side - the side of the card.
      pos - the position of the card.

    • chooseToken

      public void chooseToken(String player, Token token)
      This method sends a message to the server to choose a token. The server will respond with a TokenMessage. The client will then be able to choose the token.
      Specified by:
      chooseToken in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      player - the nickname of the player.
      token - the token chosen by the player.

    • chooseObjective

      public void chooseObjective(String player, int cardId)
      This method sends a message to the server to choose an objective. The server will respond with an ObjectiveMessage. The client will then be able to choose the objective.
      Specified by:
      chooseObjective in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      player - the nickname of the player.
      cardId - the id of the card.

    • placeCard

      public void placeCard(String player, int cardId, String side, Position pos)
      This method sends a message to the server to place a card. The server will respond with a PlaceMessage. The client will then be able to place the card.
      Specified by:
      placeCard in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      player - the nickname of the player.
      cardId - the id of the card.
      side - the side of the card.
      pos - the position of the card.

    • drawCardFromDeck

      public void drawCardFromDeck(String player, String deck)
      This method sends a message to the server to draw a card from the deck. The server will respond with a DrawDeckMessage. The client will then be able to draw the card.
      Specified by:
      drawCardFromDeck in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      player - the nickname of the player.
      deck - the deck from which the player will draw the card.

    • drawCardFromAvailable

      public void drawCardFromAvailable(String player, int cardId)
      This method sends a message to the server to draw a card from the available cards. The server will respond with a DrawAvailableMessage. The client will then be able to draw the card.
      Specified by:
      drawCardFromAvailable in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      player - the nickname of the player.
      cardId - the id of the card.
